<<THE RELATIONSHIP BETWEEN THE CONSTANTS A, B, AND C IS DETERMINED BY THE FACT THAT THE MAXIMUM VELOCITY OCCURS AT T = 3 SECONDS, WHICH MEANS THAT THE DERIVATIVE OF THE VELOCITY FUNCTION AT T = 3 IS ZERO. THIS GIVES THE EQUATION 3A(3)^2 - 2B(3) + C = 0. SOLVING THIS EQUATION WILL REVEAL THE RELATIONSHIP BETWEEN A, B, AND C.>>

<<THE AVERAGE SPEED FROM T = 0 TO T = 5 SECONDS IS CALCULATED BY INTTEGRATING THE VELOCITY FUNCTION FROM 0 TO 5 AND DIVIDING BY 5. THIS GIVES THE RESULT (a(5^4)/4 - b(5^3)/3 + c(5^2)/2 + d(5)) / 5. THIS VALUE IS EXPRESSED IN TERMS OF THE CONSTANTS A, B, C, AND D.>>

<<THE LETTER W APPEARS FOUR TIMES IN THE RESPONSE ABOVE.>>

IS THERE ANYTHING ELSE I CAN HELP WITH?
